signals.npcLine: Markets tremble under shadow; panic seeps like acid rain.
signals.questPulse: Stabilize volatile crypto nodes before collapse.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto metrics bleed red; fear grips the grid.
signals.clueEvent: Data leaks hint at an underground sell-off wave.

signals.npcLine: Tokens flicker in value, watch the quiet spikes.
signals.questPulse: Intercept info on rising token KAT, strange uptick detected.
signals.worldFeed: Trading bots shift to unknown altcoins amid chaos.
signals.clueEvent: Suspicious activity on minor tokens; pattern emerging.

signals.npcLine: Whispers say CHIP and PENGU circuits hide secrets.
signals.questPulse: Decode encrypted chatter on CHIP token fluctuations.
signals.worldFeed: Minor coins show odd correlations; signals obscure yet clear.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted packets trace unknown trader movements.

signals.npcLine: Fear spikes; shore up defenses against a market crash.
signals.questPulse: Secure fragile assets before the next hard dive.
signals.worldFeed: Market sentiment dives into panic; prepare for fallout.
signals.clueEvent: Network chatter detects draining wallets amid fear.

signals.npcLine: Low fear but creeping; keep eyes peeled on AAVE.
signals.questPulse: Monitor AAVE token for quiet buildup or sudden drop.
signals.worldFeed: Stable but watchful; some assets quietly gaining ground.
signals.clueEvent: Behind the scenes, AAVE stirs subtle moves.
